testimonials.name: Jyothyrmayi
testimonials.review: Reasonable price, prompt delivery, excellent service and a lot of varieties than any other showroom. Definitely recommend this place for marbles and granite.

testimonials.name: Dr. Sunitha Govind
testimonials.review: Beautiful and neat collection of rare designs of marbles and granites. Designer Kitchen is also available in the same premises.

testimonials.name: Harris RH
testimonials.review: Excellent place for modern kitchen setup and quality products.

testimonials.name: Premanandhan Narayanan
testimonials.review: I purchased marbles from Sam Marbles & Granites. Their service was excellent and delivery was prompt. I am happy to recommend them.
